subjects.description: Giant panda swimming gracefully underwater in a calm clear habitat.
subjects.appearance_details: Distinct black and white fur flowing softly in water, rounded ears, dark eye patches, buoyant body, paws paddling with surprising agility.
subjects.relationship: Single main panda subject moving among aquatic plants and curious fish.
subjects.location: Midwater center of a serene aquarium like underwater habitat, surrounded by plants and small fish.
subjects.relative_size: Large compared with fish and plants, filling the middle of the frame.
subjects.orientation: Body angled diagonally from lower left toward upper right, swimming forward through clear water.
subjects.pose: Streamlined floating posture with front limbs extended and rear limbs gently kicking.
subjects.action: Swims smoothly underwater, maneuvering around aquatic plants.
subjects.state_changes: Starts entering frame from one side, glides through plants while bubbles trail from fur, ends turning slightly toward a group of fish.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Dense wet black and white fur with softened underwater texture and tiny trapped air bubbles.
subjects.facial_features: Round face, black eye patches, small dark eyes, broad black nose, rounded ears.

background_setting: Serene clear underwater environment designed like a natural habitat, with lush aquatic plants, smooth stones, drifting bubbles, and a few small curious fish.

lighting.conditions: Filtered aqua light from above, caustic patterns across fur and plants, soft blue green shadows in calm water.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Filtered aqua light from above, caustic patterns across fur and plants, soft blue green shadows in calm water.

aesthetics.composition: Peaceful, surreal, graceful, clean water clarity, soft fur motion, gentle aquarium calm.

aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Peaceful, surreal, graceful, clean water clarity, soft fur motion, gentle aquarium calm.

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow underwater tracking shot at medium distance, stable camera drifting alongside the panda, visible depth layers from plants and fish.

style_medium: Realistic text to video with gentle fantasy wildlife adaptation and underwater physics.
artistic_style: Soft cinematic realism with tranquil blue green color grade and dreamy underwater atmosphere.
context: A panda adapted to aquatic life glides through clear water in a calm planted habitat.

actions.description: The panda enters the frame underwater, fur waving softly as it paddles into the clear habitat.
It swims between aquatic plants with smooth front paw strokes while small fish drift nearby.
The panda turns gently toward the fish, bubbles rising from its wet fur into the filtered light.
